def positive_python_perf_layer_database_access_select_all_columns_for_serializer_subset():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_database_access_select_all_columns_for_serializer_subset"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Database access. Flag ORM or SQL queries loading all columns when serializers use a small subset."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
